    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="es">
    <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0">
    <title>Dashboard Comercial · v2</title>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/Chart.js/4.4.1/chart.umd.min.js"></script>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Jost:wght@400;500;600;700&family=DM+Sans:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; -webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent; }
    html, body { background:#ffffff; color:#1a1916; font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; min-height:100vh; }
    :root {
    --white: #ffffff;
    --bg: #f7f5f0;
    --bg2: #eeebe3;
    --border:#e2ddd4;
    --border2:#ccc8be;
    --gold: #a8832a;
    --gold-l: #c9a84c;
    --gold-pale: #f6f0df;
    --gold-deep: #7a5f1a;
    --gold-grad: linear-gradient(135deg,#c9a84c,#a8832a);
    --g1:#1a1916; --g2:#3a3835; --g3:#68655e; --g4:#9a978f; --g5:#ccc8be;
    --green:#3d6b50; --green-p:#e5f0ea;
    --red: #944030; --red-p: #f5e8e4;
    --blue: #2a527a; --blue-p: #e3edf5;
    --sh: 0 2px 8px rgba(26,25,22,.07);
    --sh2: 0 4px 20px rgba(26,25,22,.10);
    --r: 8px; --r2: 12px;
    }
    /* ── HEADER ───────────────────────────────── */
    .header {
    background: var(--white);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 16px 16px 0;
    position: sticky; top:0; z-index:200;
    box-shadow: var(--sh);
    }
    .header-top {
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:12px;
    }
    .logo {
    font-family:'Jost',sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:1.35rem;
    color:var(--g1); letter-spacing:.01em; line-height:1;
    }
    .logo span { color:var(--gold); }
    .live {
    display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:5px;
    font-size:.6rem; color:var(--gold); letter-spacing:.07em; font-weight:500;
    }
    .live::before {
    content:''; width:5px; height:5px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--gold);
    animation: blink 2s infinite;
    }
    @keyframes blink { 0%,100%{opacity:1} 50%{opacity:.25} }
    /* Date filter bar */
    .date-bar {
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; padding-bottom:12px;
    overflow-x:auto; scrollbar-width:none;
    }
    .date-bar::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
    .date-label {
    font-size:.6rem; color:var(--g4); white-space:nowrap;
    text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.07em; flex-shrink:0;
    }
    .date-input {
    background:var(--bg); border:1px solid var(--border); color:var(--g1);
    font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; font-size:.7rem; padding:5px 8px;
    border-radius:6px; flex-shrink:0; outline:none; cursor:pointer;
    transition: border-color .15s;
    }
    .date-input:focus { border-color:var(--gold); }
    .date-sep { color:var(--g4); font-size:.7rem; flex-shrink:0; }
    .preset-btns { display:flex; gap:5px; flex-shrink:0; }
    .preset {
    background:var(--bg); border:1px solid var(--border); color:var(--g3);
    font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; font-size:.62rem; padding:5px 10px;
    border-radius:6px; cursor:pointer; white-space:nowrap; font-weight:500;
    transition: all .15s; letter-spacing:.03em;
    }
    .preset:hover { border-color:var(--gold-l); color:var(--gold-deep); }
    .preset.active { background:var(--gold-pale); border-color:var(--gold); color:var(--gold-deep); font-weight:600; }
    .apply-btn {
    background: var(--gold-grad); border:none; color:#fff;
    font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; font-size:.62rem; font-weight:600;
    padding:5px 12px; border-radius:6px; cursor:pointer; white-space:nowrap;
    letter-spacing:.04em; flex-shrink:0; transition: opacity .15s;
    }
    .apply-btn:hover { opacity:.85; }
    /* NAV TABS */
    .nav-tabs {
    background:var(--white); border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
    display:flex; overflow-x:auto; scrollbar-width:none;
    }
    .nav-tabs::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
    .tab {
    flex:1; min-width:64px; padding:10px 4px; text-align:center;
    font-size:.6rem; font-weight:600; color:var(--g4); cursor:pointer;
    border-bottom:2px solid transparent; letter-spacing:.05em; text-transform:uppercase;
    transition: all .15s; white-space:nowrap;
    }
    .tab.active { color:var(--gold); border-bottom-color:var(--gold); }
    /* ── PAGES ─────────────────────────────────── */
    .page { display:none; padding-bottom:24px; background:var(--white); }
    .page.active { display:block; }
    /* ── SECTION TITLE ─────────────────────────── */
    .sec {
    padding:20px 16px 12px;
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
    }
    .sec-ico {
    width:26px; height:26px; border-radius:6px;
    background:var(--gold-pale); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    font-size:.8rem; flex-shrink:0;
    }
    .sec-title {
    font-family:'Jost',sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:1rem; color:var(--g1);
    }
    .sec-sub {
    margin-left:auto; font-size:.58rem; color:var(--g4); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.07em;
    }
    /* ── SUMMARY STRIP ──────────────────────────── */
    .strip {
    display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);
    background:var(--g1); gap:0;
    }
    .strip-item {
    padding:14px 8px; text-align:center;
    border-right:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
    }
    .strip-item:last-child{border-right:none}
    .strip-val {
    font-family:'Jost',sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:1.3rem;
    color:var(--gold-l); line-height:1;
    }
    .strip-lbl {
    font-size:.52rem; color:var(--g4); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.07em; margin-top:3px;
    }
    /* ── KPI SCROLL ─────────────────────────────── */
    .kpi-row {
    display:flex; gap:10px; padding:0 16px 2px;
    overflow-x:auto; scrollbar-width:none;
    }
    .kpi-row::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
    .kpi {
    background:var(--white); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--r);
    padding:14px 14px 12px; min-width:120px; flex-shrink:0; box-shadow:var(--sh);
    position:relative; overflow:hidden;
    }
    .kpi::after {
    content:''; position:absolute; bottom:0; left:0; right:0; height:3px;
    }
    .kpi.g::after { background:var(--gold-grad); }
    .kpi.gn::after { background:var(--green); }
    .kpi.rd::after { background:var(--red); }
    .kpi.gy::after { background:var(--g3); }
    .kpi.bl::after { background:var(--blue); }
    .kpi-lbl { font-size:.57rem; color:var(--g4); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.09em; margin-bottom:7px; font-weight:500; }
    .kpi-val { font-family:'Jost',sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:1.85rem; line-height:1; color:var(--g1); margin-bottom:3px; }
    .kpi.g .kpi-val { color:var(--gold-deep); }
    .kpi.gn .kpi-val { color:var(--green); }
    .kpi.rd .kpi-val { color:var(--red); }
    .kpi-sub { font-size:.58rem; color:var(--g4); }
    /* ── CHART CARD ─────────────────────────────── */
    .cc {
    background:var(--white); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--r);
    margin:0 16px 12px; padding:16px; box-shadow:var(--sh);
    }
    .cc h3 { font-family:'Jost',sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:.95rem; color:var(--g1); margin-bottom:3px; }
    .cc-sub { font-size:.58rem; color:var(--g4); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.05em; margin-bottom:14px; }
    canvas { max-width:100%; }
    /* ── CLOSER CARDS ───────────────────────────── */
    .closer-list { padding:0 16px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:10px; }
    .ccard {
    background:var(--white); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--r2);
    box-shadow:var(--sh); overflow:hidden;
    }
    .ccard-head {
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; padding:14px 14px;
    cursor:pointer; user-select:none;
    }
    .cav {
    width:38px; height:38px; border-radius:50%; flex-shrink:0;
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    font-family:'Jost',sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:1.05rem;
    }
    .cav-I { background:var(--gold-pale); color:var(--gold-deep); }
    .cav-K { background:var(--green-p); color:var(--green); }
    .cav-S { background:var(--blue-p); color:var(--blue); }
    .cav-G { background:#f2eef8; color:#5a4a8a; }
    .cname { font-family:'Jost',sans-serif; font-weight:600; font-size:1rem; color:var(--g1); flex:1; }
    .cbadge {
    font-size:.56rem; font-weight:600; padding:3px 8px; border-radius:20px;
    letter-spacing:.05em; text-transform:uppercase;
    }
    .b-gold { background:var(--gold-pale); color:var(--gold-deep); }
    .b-red { background:var(--red-p); color:var(--red); }
    .b-grey { background:var(--bg2); color:var(--g3); }
    .b-blue { background:var(--blue-p); color:var(--blue); }
    .chevron { font-size:.65rem; color:var(--g4); margin-left:4px; transition:transform .22s; }
    .ccard.open .chevron { transform:rotate(180deg); }
    .cstats {
    display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);
    border-top:1px solid var(--border); background:var(--bg);
    }
    .cs { padding:10px 8px; text-align:center; border-right:1px solid var(--border); }
    .cs:last-child{border-right:none}
    .cs-val { font-family:'Jost',sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:1.25rem; color:var(--g1); line-height:1; }
    .cs-lbl { font-size:.54rem; color:var(--g4); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.06em; margin-top:3px; }
    .cdetail { display:none; }
    .ccard.open .cdetail { display:block; }
    .rate-block { padding:12px 14px; border-top:1px solid var(--border); }
    .rate-row-item { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; margin-bottom:8px; }
    .rate-row-item:last-child{margin-bottom:0}
    .rate-name { font-size:.6rem; color:var(--g3); width:72px; flex-shrink:0; }
    .rate-track { flex:1; height:5px; background:var(--bg2); border-radius:3px; overflow:hidden; }
    .rate-fill { height:100%; border-radius:3px; }
    .rate-pct { font-size:.63rem; font-weight:600; color:var(--g2); width:38px; text-align:right; flex-shrink:0; }
    .wtable-wrap { padding:0 14px 14px; }
    .wtable { width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; font-size:.64rem; }
    .wtable th { padding:8px 8px; text-align:right; font-size:.55rem; color:var(--g4); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.06em; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); background:var(--white); }
    .wtable th:first-child{text-align:left}
    .wtable td { padding:9px 8px; text-align:right; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); color:var(--g3); }
    .wtable td:first-child{text-align:left;color:var(--g2)}
    .wtable tr:last-child td { border-bottom:none; font-weight:600; color:var(--g1); background:var(--bg); }
    .cash { color:var(--green)!important; font-weight:600!important; font-family:'Jost',sans-serif; font-size:.82rem!important; }
    /* ── ALERT BOXES ────────────────────────────── */
    .alert {
    margin:0 14px 12px; padding:11px 13px;
    border-left:3px solid; border-radius:0 var(--r) var(--r) 0;
    font-size:.68rem; line-height:1.5;
    }
    .alert.warn { border-color:var(--red); background:var(--red-p); color:var(--red); }
    .alert.info { border-color:var(--gold); background:var(--gold-pale); color:var(--gold-deep); }
    .alert.ok { border-color:var(--green); background:var(--green-p); color:var(--green); }
    .alert.gy { border-color:var(--g3); background:var(--bg); color:var(--g2); }
    .alert-title { font-size:.57rem; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:.08em; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:4px; opacity:.7; }
    /* ── CONFIRMER ──────────────────────────────── */
    .conf-header {
    background:var(--g1); margin:0 16px 12px; border-radius:var(--r2);
    padding:16px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px;
    }
    .conf-av {
    width:42px; height:42px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--gold-grad);
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    font-family:'Jost',sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:1.15rem; color:#fff; flex-shrink:0;
    }
    .conf-name { font-family:'Jost',sans-serif; font-weight:600; font-size:1.05rem; color:#fff; }
    .conf-role { font-size:.58rem; color:var(--g4); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.07em; }
    .conf-rate { margin-left:auto; text-align:right; }
    .conf-rate-val { font-family:'Jost',sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:1.6rem; color:var(--gold-l); line-height:1; }
    .conf-rate-lbl { font-size:.54rem; color:var(--g4); }
    .conf-stats { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:10px; margin:0 16px 12px; }
    .conf-stat { background:var(--white); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--r); padding:12px; text-align:center; box-shadow:var(--sh); }
    .conf-stat-val { font-family:'Jost',sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:1.5rem; line-height:1; margin-bottom:3px; }
    .conf-stat-lbl { font-size:.56rem; color:var(--g4); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.06em; }
    .pipe-bar { display:flex; height:22px; border-radius:var(--r); overflow:hidden; gap:2px; margin:0 16px 14px; }
    .pipe-seg { height:100%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:.56rem; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:.03em; }
    /* ── VENTAS TABLE ───────────────────────────── */
    .vtable-wrap {
    margin:0 16px 12px; border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--r); overflow:hidden; box-shadow:var(--sh);
    }
    .vrow { display:flex; gap:4px; padding:10px 14px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); align-items:center; }
    .vrow:last-child{border-bottom:none}
    .vrow.hdr { background:var(--bg); border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2); }
    .vcol { flex:1; font-size:.62rem; min-width:0; }
    .vlbl { font-size:.56rem; color:var(--g4); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.07em; font-weight:600; }
    .vname { font-weight:500; color:var(--g1); white-space:nowrap; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; }
    .vclose { font-size:.58rem; color:var(--g4); }
    .vmonto { text-align:right; font-weight:600; font-family:'Jost',sans-serif; font-size:.85rem; color:var(--g1); }
    .vcobrado { text-align:right; color:var(--green); font-weight:600; font-size:.75rem; }
    .vpdte { text-align:right; font-weight:600; font-size:.75rem; }
    /* ── FORECAST ───────────────────────────────── */
    .fc-list { padding:0 16px; }
    .fc-row { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; padding:10px 0; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); }
    .fc-row:last-child{border-bottom:none}
    .fc-week { font-size:.58rem; color:var(--g4); width:88px; flex-shrink:0; }
    .fc-track { flex:1; height:8px; background:var(--bg2); border-radius:4px; overflow:hidden; }
    .fc-fill { height:100%; border-radius:4px; background:var(--gold-grad); }
    .fc-amt { width:64px; text-align:right; font-family:'Jost',sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:.88rem; color:var(--gold-deep); flex-shrink:0; }
    /* ── INSIGHTS ───────────────────────────────── */
    .insight-list { padding:0 16px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:10px; }
    .insight {
    background:var(--white); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--r);
    padding:14px; box-shadow:var(--sh); display:flex; gap:12px;
    }
    .ins-ico { width:30px; height:30px; border-radius:50%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:.9rem; flex-shrink:0; }
    .ins-title { font-size:.58rem; font-weight:600; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.08em; margin-bottom:4px; }
    .ins-text { font-size:.68rem; line-height:1.55; color:var(--g2); }
    /* ── DIVIDER ────────────────────────────────── */
    .divider { height:1px; background:var(--border); margin:20px 16px 0; }
    /* ── ANIMATIONS ─────────────────────────────── */
    @keyframes up { from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(12px)} to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)} }
    .kpi,.ccard,.cc,.vtable-wrap { animation:up .35s ease both; }
    .kpi:nth-child(1){animation-delay:.04s} .kpi:nth-child(2){animation-delay:.08s}
    .kpi:nth-child(3){animation-delay:.12s} .kpi:nth-child(4){animation-delay:.16s}
    .kpi:nth-child(5){animation-delay:.20s} .kpi:nth-child(6){animation-delay:.24s}
    .ccard:nth-child(1){animation-delay:.06s} .ccard:nth-child(2){animation-delay:.12s}
    .ccard:nth-child(3){animation-delay:.18s} .ccard:nth-child(4){animation-delay:.24s}
    /* ── NO DATA STATE ──────────────────────────── */
    .no-data {
    text-align:center; padding:40px 20px; color:var(--g4);
    font-size:.75rem; line-height:1.6;
    }
    .no-data span { display:block; font-size:1.8rem; margin-bottom:8px; }
    </style>
    </head>
    <body>
    <!-- HEADER -->
    <!-- LOADER -->
    <div id="loader" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:100vh;background:#fff;gap:16px;">
    <div style="width:36px;height:36px;border:3px solid #e2ddd4;border-top-color:#a8832a;border-radius:50%;animation:spin 0.8s linear infinite;"></div>
    <div style="font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:.75rem;color:#9a978f;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;">Cargando datos en vivo...</div>
    </div>
    <style>@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}</style>
    <!-- ERROR BANNER -->
    <div id="error-banner" style="display:none;background:#f5e8e4;border-bottom:2px solid #944030;padding:12px 16px;align-items:center;gap:10px;">
    <span style="font-size:1rem;">⚠️</span>
    <span id="error-msg" style="font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:.7rem;color:#944030;flex:1;"></span>
    <button onclick="fetchAllData()" style="background:#944030;color:#fff;border:none;padding:6px 12px;font-size:.65rem;border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;">Reintentar</button>
    </div>
    <div id="main-content" style="display:none;">
    <div class="header">
    <div class="header-top">
    <div class="logo">CONVIERTE <span>OPS</span></div>
    <div style="text-align:right">
    <span class="live">EN VIVO</span>
    <div id="last-updated" style="font-size:.52rem;color:var(--g4);margin-top:2px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- DATE FILTER -->
    <div class="date-bar">
    <span class="date-label">Período:</span>
    <input type="date" id="date-from" class="date-input" value="">
    <span class="date-sep">→</span>
    <input type="date" id="date-to" class="date-input" value="">
    <div class="preset-btns">
    <button class="preset" onclick="setPreset('feb')">Feb</button>
    <button class="preset" onclick="setPreset('mar')">Mar</button>
    <button class="preset" onclick="setPreset('all')">Todo</button>
    <button class="preset" onclick="setPreset('last7')">7d</button>
    </div>
    <button class="apply-btn" onclick="applyFilter()">Aplicar</button><button class="apply-btn" style="background:var(--g2);margin-left:4px;" onclick="fetchAllData()">↻ Sync</button>
    </div>
    <!-- NAV TABS -->
    <div class="nav-tabs">
    <div class="tab active" onclick="showPage('general',this)">General</div>
    <div class="tab" onclick="showPage('closers',this)">Closers</div>
    <div class="tab" onclick="showPage('confirmer',this)">Confirmer</div>
    <div class="tab" onclick="showPage('ventas',this)">Ventas</div>
    <div class="tab" onclick="showPage('insights',this)">Insights</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- SUMMARY STRIP -->
    <div class="strip" id="strip">
    <div class="strip-item"><div class="strip-val" id="s-cash">—</div><div class="strip-lbl">Cobrado</div></div>
    <div class="strip-item"><div class="strip-val" id="s-ventas">—</div><div class="strip-lbl">Venta Total</div></div>
    <div class="strip-item"><div class="strip-val" id="s-close">—</div><div class="strip-lbl">Close Rate</div></div>
    <div class="strip-item"><div class="strip-val" id="s-show">—</div><div class="strip-lbl">Show Rate</div></div>
    </div>
    <!-- ═══════════════ PAGE: GENERAL ═══════════════ -->
    <div id="page-general" class="page active">
    <div class="sec">
    <div class="sec-ico">📊</div>
    <span class="sec-title">KPIs Globales</span>
    <span class="sec-sub" id="range-label">Feb–Mar 2026</span>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-row" id="kpi-row">
    <div class="kpi g"><div class="kpi-lbl">Cash Cobrado</div><div class="kpi-val" id="k-cash">—</div><div class="kpi-sub">USD período</div></div>
    <div class="kpi gn"><div class="kpi-lbl">Venta Total</div><div class="kpi-val" id="k-venta-total">—</div><div class="kpi-sub" id="k-venta-total-sub">contratos</div></div>
    <div class="kpi gy"><div class="kpi-lbl">Ventas #</div><div class="kpi-val" id="k-ventas">—</div><div class="kpi-sub" id="k-ventas-sub">pipeline</div></div>
    <div class="kpi gy"><div class="kpi-lbl">Agendas</div><div class="kpi-val" id="k-agendas">—</div><div class="kpi-sub">leads totales</div></div>
    <div class="kpi gy"><div class="kpi-lbl">Show Rate</div><div class="kpi-val" id="k-show">—</div><div class="kpi-sub" id="k-show-sub">asistencias</div></div>
    <div class="kpi g"><div class="kpi-lbl">Close Rate</div><div class="kpi-val" id="k-close">—</div><div class="kpi-sub" id="k-close-sub">cierres</div></div>
    <div class="kpi gy"><div class="kpi-lbl">Ticket Prom.</div><div class="kpi-val" id="k-ticket">—</div><div class="kpi-sub">USD / venta</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="divider"></div>
    <div class="sec"><div class="sec-ico">💎</div><span class="sec-title">Desglose de Cash</span></div>
    <div class="kpi-row" id="tipo-row" style="padding-bottom:12px;"></div>
    <div class="divider"></div>
    <div class="sec"><div class="sec-ico">📈</div><span class="sec-title">Cash Semanal</span></div>
    <div class="cc"><h3>Evolución de Cobros</h3><div class="cc-sub">USD · Semana a semana</div><canvas id="c-cash" height="180"></canvas></div>
    <div class="cc"><h3>Embudo por Closer</h3><div class="cc-sub">Agendas → Asistencias → Cierres</div><canvas id="c-funnel" height="180"></canvas></div>
    </div>
    <!-- ═══════════════ PAGE: CLOSERS ═══════════════ -->
    <div id="page-closers" class="page">
    <div class="sec"><div class="sec-ico">👤</div><span class="sec-title">Performance Closers</span></div>
    <div class="closer-list" id="closer-list">
    <!-- rendered by JS -->
    </div>
    <div class="divider"></div>
    <div style="height:12px"></div>
    <div class="cc"><h3>Show Rate vs Close Rate</h3><div class="cc-sub">% comparado por closer</div><canvas id="c-rates" height="200"></canvas></div>
    </div>
    <!-- ═══════════════ PAGE: CONFIRMER ═══════════════ -->
    <div id="page-confirmer" class="page">
    <div class="sec"><div class="sec-ico">📞</div><span class="sec-title">Call Confirmers</span></div>
    <div id="conf-header-wrap"><!-- JS --></div>
    <div id="conf-stats-wrap" class="conf-stats"><!-- JS --></div>
    <div class="pipe-bar" id="conf-pipe"><!-- JS --></div>
    <div class="cc"><h3>Resultados por Semana</h3><div class="cc-sub">Confirmados, Cancelados, Descalificados</div><canvas id="c-conf-week" height="200"></canvas></div>
    <div class="cc"><h3>Leads por Closer</h3><div class="cc-sub">Confirmados asignados</div><canvas id="c-conf-closer" height="200"></canvas></div>
    </div>
    <!-- ═══════════════ PAGE: VENTAS ═══════════════ -->
    <div id="page-ventas" class="page">
    <div class="sec"><div class="sec-ico">💰</div><span class="sec-title">Pipeline de Ventas</span></div>
    <div class="kpi-row" id="ventas-kpis"><!-- JS --></div>
    <div style="height:14px"></div>
    <div id="vtable-wrap"><!-- JS --></div>
    <div class="divider"></div>
    <div class="sec"><div class="sec-ico">📅</div><span class="sec-title">Forecast Semanal</span></div>
    <div class="fc-list" id="fc-list"><!-- JS --></div>
    </div>
    <!-- ═══════════════ PAGE: INSIGHTS ═══════════════ -->
    <div id="page-insights" class="page">
    <div class="sec"><div class="sec-ico">💡</div><span class="sec-title">Insights Estratégicos</span></div>
    <div class="insight-list" id="insight-list"><!-- JS --></div>
    </div>
    <script>
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
    // LIVE DATA — fetched from Google Sheets CSV
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
    // Google Apps Script endpoint — no CORS issues
    const APPS_SCRIPT_URL = 'https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbzTzv4pgA-OlECn0M_v0X1-7qjob3QVIWYULlvriIyFdqOoBlNVpmCRxvnqBIIQHgeQ/exec';
    // CSV parser — handles quoted fields, \r\n, and Google Sheets export format
    function parseCSV(text) {
    // Normalize line endings
    text = text.replace(/\r\n/g,'\n').replace(/\r/g,'\n');
    const lines = text.trim().split('\n');
    function parseLine(line) {
    const vals = [];
    let cur = '', inQ = false;
    for (let i = 0; i < line.length; i++) {
    const ch = line[i];
    if (ch === '"') {
    if (inQ && line[i+1] === '"') { cur += '"'; i++; }
    else inQ = !inQ;
    } else if (ch === ',' && !inQ) {
    vals.push(cur.trim());
    cur = '';
    } else {
    cur += ch;
    }
    }
    vals.push(cur.trim());
    return vals;
    }
    const headers = parseLine(lines[0]);
    console.log('CSV headers:', headers);
    return lines.slice(1).filter(l => l.trim()).map(line => {
    const vals = parseLine(line);
    const obj = {};
    headers.forEach((h,i) => { obj[h] = (vals[i]||''); });
    return obj;
    });
    }
    function toDate(val) {
    if (!val && val !== 0) return null;
    // Google Apps Script Date object serialized as "Date(year,month,day,...)"
    if (typeof val === 'string' && val.startsWith('Date(')) {
    const parts = val.slice(5,-1).split(',').map(Number);
    const d = new Date(parts[0], parts[1], parts[2]);
    return d.getFullYear() + '-' + String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0') + '-' + String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');
    }
    // JS Date object or timestamp
    if (val instanceof Date || (typeof val === 'object' && val !== null)) {
    try {
    const d = new Date(val);
    if (!isNaN(d)) return d.getFullYear() + '-' + String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0') + '-' + String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');
    } catch(e) {}
    }
    const str = String(val).trim();
    if (!str || str === '' || str === 'NaT' || str === 'nan' || str === 'null') return null;
    // YYYY-MM-DD (ISO)
    if (/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}/.test(str)) return str.slice(0,10);
    // DD/MM/YYYY
    if (/^\d{1,2}\/\d{1,2}\/\d{4}$/.test(str)) {
    const [d,m,y] = str.split('/');
    return `${y}-${m.padStart(2,'0')}-${d.padStart(2,'0')}`;
    }
    // MM/DD/YYYY
    if (/^\d{1,2}\/\d{1,2}\/\d{2,4}$/.test(str)) {
    const parts = str.split('/');
    const y = parts[2].length === 2 ? '20'+parts[2] : parts[2];
    return `${y}-${parts[0].padStart(2,'0')}-${parts[1].padStart(2,'0')}`;
    }
    // Try native Date parse as last resort
    const d = new Date(str);
    if (!isNaN(d)) return d.getFullYear() + '-' + String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0') + '-' + String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');
    return null;
    }
    function toNum(val) {
    if (typeof val === 'number') return isNaN(val) ? 0 : val;
    if (!val) return 0;
    const n = parseFloat(String(val).replace(/,/g,'.'));
    return isNaN(n) ? 0 : n;
    }
    // Flexible column finder — finds key by partial match, case-insensitive
    function col(row, ...candidates) {
    const keys = Object.keys(row);
    for (const c of candidates) {
    const found = keys.find(k => k.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g,'').includes(c.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g,'')));
    if (found && row[found] !== undefined && row[found] !== '') return row[found];
    }
    return '';
    }
    function transformMD(rows) {
    if (rows.length > 0) console.log('MD columns:', Object.keys(rows[0]));
    return rows.filter(r => col(r,'fecha') && col(r,'closer') && col(r,'closer') !== 'Closer').map(r => ({
    Fecha: toDate(col(r,'fecha')),
    Closer: col(r,'closer'),
    Agendas: toNum(col(r,'agendas')),
    Asistencias: toNum(col(r,'asistencias')),
    Cierres: toNum(col(r,'cierres')),
    Seguimientos: toNum(col(r,'seguimientos')),
    CashCollect: toNum(col(r,'cashcollect','cash collect','cashcol')),
    })).filter(r => r.Fecha && r.Closer);
    }
    function transformCC(rows) {
    if (rows.length > 0) console.log('CC columns:', Object.keys(rows[0]));
    return rows.filter(r => col(r,'fecha') && col(r,'confirmer')).map(r => ({
    Fecha: toDate(col(r,'fecha')),
    Confirmer: col(r,'confirmer'),
    Estado: col(r,'estado') || '',
    Closer: col(r,'closer') || '',
    })).filter(r => r.Fecha);
    }
    function transformV(rows) {
    if (rows.length > 0) console.log('V columns:', Object.keys(rows[0]));
    return rows.filter(r => col(r,'cliente') && col(r,'fechacierre','fecha cierre') && col(r,'venta')).map(r => ({
    Cliente: col(r,'cliente'),
    'Fecha Cierre': toDate(col(r,'fechacierre','fecha cierre')),
    Closer: col(r,'closer'),
    Plan: col(r,'plan'),
    Venta: toNum(col(r,'venta')),
    Cobrado: toNum(col(r,'cobrado')),
    Pendiente: toNum(col(r,'pdte','pendiente','pago')),
    })).filter(r => r['Fecha Cierre']);
    }
    function transformCO(rows) {
    if (rows.length > 0) console.log('CO columns:', Object.keys(rows[0]));
    return rows.filter(r => col(r,'fechapago','fecha pago') && col(r,'montopagado','monto pagado')).map(r => ({
    Fecha: toDate(col(r,'fechapago','fecha pago')),
    Closer: col(r,'closer'),
    Monto: toNum(col(r,'montopagado','monto pagado')),
    ComCloser: toNum(col(r,'comisioncloser','comision closer')),
    ComConf: toNum(col(r,'comisionconfirmer','comision confirmer')),
    Tipo: (col(r,'tipo') || 'CxC').toString().trim(),
    })).filter(r => r.Fecha);
    }
    function transformCL(rows) {
    // CLOSER_LOG: used to recalculate real asistencias
    // Asistencia real = any event that is NOT 'No Asiste' or 'Cancelada'
    const NO_ASISTE = ['no asiste','cancelada','cancelado'];
    return rows.filter(r => col(r,'fecha') && col(r,'closer')).map(r => ({
    Fecha: toDate(col(r,'fecha')),
    Closer: col(r,'closer'),
    Evento: (col(r,'evento') || '').toString().trim(),
    })).filter(r => r.Fecha && r.Closer && r.Closer !== 'Closer');
    }
    // Global data store
    let RAW_MD = [], RAW_CC = [], RAW_V = [], RAW_C = [], RAW_CL = [];
    let dataLoaded = false;
    async function fetchAllData() {
    showLoader(true);
    try {
    const res = await fetch(APPS_SCRIPT_URL);
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + res.status);
    const json = await res.json();
    RAW_MD = transformMD(json['METRICAS_DIARIAS'] || []);
    RAW_CC = transformCC(json['CALL_CONFIRMER_LOG'] || []);
    RAW_V = transformV(json['VENTAS'] || []);
    RAW_C = transformCO(json['COBROS_DIARIOS'] || []);
    RAW_CL = transformCL(json['CLOSER_LOG'] || []);
    dataLoaded = true;
    // Set date range from actual data
    const allDates = [...RAW_MD.map(r=>r.Fecha), ...RAW_CC.map(r=>r.Fecha)].filter(Boolean).sort();
    if (allDates.length) {
    dateFrom = allDates[0];
    dateTo = allDates[allDates.length-1];
    document.getElementById('date-from').value = dateFrom;
    document.getElementById('date-to').value = dateTo;
    }
    showLoader(false);
    const now = new Date();
    const ts = now.toLocaleDateString('es-CL') + ' ' + now.toLocaleTimeString('es-CL',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'});
    document.getElementById('last-updated').textContent = 'Actualizado: ' + ts;
    renderAll();
    } catch(err) {
    showLoader(false);
    showError('Error al cargar datos: ' + err.message);
    console.error(err);
    }
    }
    function showLoader(show) {
    document.getElementById('loader').style.display = show ? 'flex' : 'none';
    document.getElementById('main-content').style.display = show ? 'none' : 'block';
    }
    function showError(msg) {
    document.getElementById('error-msg').textContent = msg;
    document.getElementById('error-banner').style.display = 'flex';
    }
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
    // FILTERS
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
    let dateFrom = '', dateTo = '';
    function setPreset(p) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.preset').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
    event.target.classList.add('active');
    // Get actual data range dynamically
    const allDates = [...RAW_MD.map(r=>r.Fecha), ...RAW_CC.map(r=>r.Fecha), ...RAW_C.map(r=>r.Fecha)]
    .filter(Boolean).sort();
    const minDate = allDates[0] || '2026-01-01';
    const maxDate = allDates[allDates.length-1] || new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);
    const maxYear = maxDate.slice(0,4);
    const maxMonth = maxDate.slice(5,7);
    if (p === 'feb') {
    dateFrom = maxYear + '-02-01';
    dateTo = maxYear + '-02-28';
    }
    if (p === 'mar') {
    dateFrom = maxYear + '-03-01';
    dateTo = maxDate; // use last date with actual data
    }
    if (p === 'all') {
    dateFrom = minDate;
    dateTo = maxDate;
    }
    if (p === 'last7'){
    const d = new Date(maxDate);
    d.setDate(d.getDate() - 6);
    dateFrom = d.toISOString().slice(0,10);
    dateTo = maxDate;
    }
    document.getElementById('date-from').value = dateFrom;
    document.getElementById('date-to').value = dateTo;
    applyFilter();
    }
    function applyFilter() {
    dateFrom = document.getElementById('date-from').value;
    dateTo = document.getElementById('date-to').value;
    renderAll();
    }
    function inRange(d) { return d >= dateFrom && d <= dateTo; }
    function weekOf(dateStr) {
    const d = new Date(dateStr);
    const day = d.getDay(); // 0=Sun
    const diff = d.getDate() - day + (day===0 ? -6 : 1);
    const mon = new Date(d.setDate(diff));
    return mon.toISOString().slice(0,10);
    }
    function fmtDate(d) { return d.slice(5).replace('-','/'); }
    function fmtMoney(n) {
    if (n >= 1000) return '$' + (n/1000).toFixed(1).replace('.0','') + 'K';
    return '$' + Math.round(n);
    }
    function pct(a,b) { return b ? Math.round(a/b*100) : 0; }
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
    // CHART INSTANCES
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
    const charts = {};
    function destroyChart(id) { if(charts[id]){ charts[id].destroy(); delete charts[id]; } }
    Chart.defaults.color = '#9a978f';
    Chart.defaults.borderColor = '#e2ddd4';
    Chart.defaults.font.family = "'DM Sans',sans-serif";
    Chart.defaults.font.size = 10;
    const GOLD='#a8832a', GOLD_L='#c9a84c', GOLD_P='rgba(168,131,42,.12)';
    const GREEN='#3d6b50', GREEN_P='rgba(61,107,80,.15)';
    const RED='#944030', RED_P='rgba(148,64,48,.15)';
    const BLUE='#2a527a', BLUE_P='rgba(42,82,122,.12)';
    const GY='#9a978f', GY_P='rgba(154,151,143,.12)';
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
    // COMPUTE STATS
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
    function computeStats() {
    const md = RAW_MD.filter(r => inRange(r.Fecha));
    const cc = RAW_CC.filter(r => inRange(r.Fecha));
    const v = RAW_V.filter(r => inRange(r['Fecha Cierre']));
    const co = RAW_C.filter(r => inRange(r.Fecha));
    // Global MD
    const totAg = md.reduce((s,r)=>s+r.Agendas,0);
    const NO_ASISTE_G = ['no asiste','cancelada','cancelado'];
    const clAll = RAW_CL.filter(r => inRange(r.Fecha));
    const totAs = clAll.filter(r => !NO_ASISTE_G.includes(r.Evento.toLowerCase())).length;
    const totCi = md.reduce((s,r)=>s+r.Cierres,0);
    const totCash = co.reduce((s,r)=>s+r.Monto,0);
    const totVenta = v.reduce((s,r)=>s+r.Venta,0);
    const totCobrado = v.reduce((s,r)=>s+r.Cobrado,0);
    const totPdte = v.reduce((s,r)=>s+r.Pendiente,0);
    // Per closer
    // Real asistencias from CLOSER_LOG: any event that is NOT 'No Asiste' or 'Cancelada'
    const NO_ASISTE = ['no asiste','cancelada','cancelado'];
    const cl = RAW_CL.filter(r => inRange(r.Fecha));
    const closerNames = [...new Set([...md.map(r=>r.Closer), ...cl.map(r=>r.Closer)])].filter(Boolean);
    const closers = ['Ignacio','Sebastian','Karim','Guillermo'].filter(c => closerNames.includes(c))
    .concat(closerNames.filter(c => !['Ignacio','Sebastian','Karim','Guillermo'].includes(c)));
    const byCloser = {};
    closers.forEach(c => {
    const rows = md.filter(r=>r.Closer===c);
    const coRows = co.filter(r=>r.Closer===c);
    const vRows = v.filter(r=>r.Closer===c);
    const clRows = cl.filter(r=>r.Closer===c);
    // Real asistencias: events that are not No Asiste or Cancelada
    const realAs = clRows.filter(r => !NO_ASISTE.includes(r.Evento.toLowerCase())).length;
    byCloser[c] = {
    ag: rows.reduce((s,r)=>s+r.Agendas,0),
    as: realAs,
    ci: rows.reduce((s,r)=>s+r.Cierres,0),
    se: rows.reduce((s,r)=>s+r.Seguimientos,0),
    cash: coRows.reduce((s,r)=>s+r.Monto,0),
    ventas: vRows.length,
    };
    });
    // Weekly cash
    const weekCash = {};
    co.forEach(r => { const w=weekOf(r.Fecha); weekCash[w]=(weekCash[w]||0)+r.Monto; });
    // Weekly confirmer
    const weekConf = {};
    cc.forEach(r => {
    const w=weekOf(r.Fecha);
    if(!weekConf[w]) weekConf[w]={conf:0,canc:0,desc:0};
    if(r.Estado==='Confirmado') weekConf[w].conf++;
    else if(r.Estado==='Cancelado') weekConf[w].canc++;
    else if(r.Estado==='Descalificado') weekConf[w].desc++;
    });
    // Confirmer totals
    const confConf = cc.filter(r=>r.Estado==='Confirmado').length;
    const confCanc = cc.filter(r=>r.Estado==='Cancelado').length;
    const confDesc = cc.filter(r=>r.Estado==='Descalificado').length;
    const confTotal = confConf+confCanc+confDesc;
    // Conf by closer
    const confByCloser = {};
    cc.filter(r=>r.Estado==='Confirmado').forEach(r=>{
    confByCloser[r.Closer]=(confByCloser[r.Closer]||0)+1;
    });
    // Cash by tipo
    const tipoBreakdown = {};
    ['Nuevo','CxC','Renovación','Upsell'].forEach(t => {
    tipoBreakdown[t] = co.filter(r => r.Tipo === t).reduce((s,r) => s+r.Monto, 0);
    });
    // Weekly cash by tipo
    const weekCashTipo = {};
    co.forEach(r => {
    const w = weekOf(r.Fecha);
    if (!weekCashTipo[w]) weekCashTipo[w] = {Nuevo:0,CxC:0,'Renovación':0,Upsell:0,total:0};
    weekCashTipo[w][r.Tipo] = (weekCashTipo[w][r.Tipo]||0) + r.Monto;
    weekCashTipo[w].total += r.Monto;
    });
    return {md,cc,v,co,totAg,totAs,totCi,totCash,totVenta,totCobrado,totPdte,byCloser,weekCash,weekConf,confConf,confCanc,confDesc,confTotal,confByCloser,closers,tipoBreakdown,weekCashTipo};
    }
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
    // RENDER ALL
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
    function renderAll() {
    const s = computeStats();
    renderStrip(s);
    renderKPIs(s);
    renderRangeLabel();
    renderCashChart(s);
    renderFunnelChart(s);
    renderClosers(s);
    renderRatesChart(s);
    renderConfirmer(s);
    renderVentas(s);
    renderTipo(s);
    renderInsights(s);
    }
    function renderRangeLabel() {
    const f = dateFrom.slice(5).replace('-','/');
    const t = dateTo.slice(5).replace('-','/');
    document.getElementById('range-label').textContent = f + ' – ' + t;
    }
    function renderStrip(s) {
    const showRate = pct(s.totAs, s.totAg);
    const closeRate = pct(s.totCi, s.totAs);
    document.getElementById('s-cash').textContent = fmtMoney(s.totCash);
    document.getElementById('s-ventas').textContent = fmtMoney(s.totVenta);
    document.getElementById('s-close').textContent = closeRate+'%';
    document.getElementById('s-show').textContent = showRate+'%';
    }
    function renderKPIs(s) {
    const sr = pct(s.totAs,s.totAg), cr = pct(s.totCi,s.totAs);
    const ticket = s.v.length ? Math.round(s.totVenta/s.v.length) : 0;
    document.getElementById('k-cash').textContent = fmtMoney(s.totCash);
    document.getElementById('k-venta-total').textContent = fmtMoney(s.totVenta);
    document.getElementById('k-venta-total-sub').textContent = s.v.length+' contratos';
    document.getElementById('k-ventas').textContent = s.v.length;
    document.getElementById('k-ventas-sub').textContent = fmtMoney(s.totVenta)+' pipeline';
    document.getElementById('k-agendas').textContent = s.totAg;
    document.getElementById('k-show').textContent = sr+'%';
    document.getElementById('k-show-sub').textContent = s.totAs+'/'+s.totAg+' asist.';
    document.getElementById('k-close').textContent = cr+'%';
    document.getElementById('k-close-sub').textContent = s.totCi+'/'+s.totAs+' cierres';
    document.getElementById('k-ticket').textContent = fmtMoney(ticket);
    }
    function renderCashChart(s) {
    destroyChart('cash');
    const weeks = Object.keys(s.weekCash).sort();
    const vals = weeks.map(w=>Math.round(s.weekCash[w]));
    const ctx = document.getElementById('c-cash').getContext('2d');
    charts['cash'] = new Chart(ctx,{
    type:'line',
    data:{ labels:weeks.map(fmtDate), datasets:[{
    label:'USD',data:vals,borderColor:GOLD,backgroundColor:GOLD_P,
    borderWidth:2.5,pointBackgroundColor:GOLD,pointBorderColor:'#fff',
    pointBorderWidth:2,pointRadius:5,fill:true,tension:.35
    }]},
    options:{responsive:true,plugins:{legend:{display:false}},scales:{
    y:{grid:{color:'#f0ece4'},ticks:{callback:v=>'$'+(v/1000).toFixed(0)+'K'}},
    x:{grid:{color:'#f0ece4'}}
    }}
    });
    }
    function renderFunnelChart(s) {
    destroyChart('funnel');
    const cls = Object.keys(s.byCloser).filter(c=>s.byCloser[c].ag+s.byCloser[c].as>0);
    const ctx = document.getElementById('c-funnel').getContext('2d');
    charts['funnel'] = new Chart(ctx,{
    type:'bar',
    data:{
    labels:cls,
    datasets:[
    {label:'Agendas', data:cls.map(c=>s.byCloser[c].ag), backgroundColor:GY_P, borderColor:GY, borderWidth:1},
    {label:'Asistencias',data:cls.map(c=>s.byCloser[c].as), backgroundColor:GOLD_P,borderColor:GOLD, borderWidth:1},
    {label:'Cierres', data:cls.map(c=>s.byCloser[c].ci), backgroundColor:GREEN_P,borderColor:GREEN, borderWidth:1},
    ]
    },
    options:{responsive:true,
    plugins:{legend:{position:'bottom',labels:{boxWidth:8,padding:10,color:'#68655e'}}},
    scales:{y:{grid:{color:'#f0ece4'}},x:{grid:{color:'#f0ece4'}}}
    }
    });
    }
    function renderClosers(s) {
    const badges = {
    Ignacio:{cls:'b-gold',txt:'Líder'},
    Sebastian:{cls:'b-red',txt:'Sin Cierres'},
    Karim:{cls:'b-grey',txt:'En Desarrollo'},
    Guillermo:{cls:'b-grey',txt:'Baja Actividad'}
    };
    const cavs = {Ignacio:'cav-I',Sebastian:'cav-S',Karim:'cav-K',Guillermo:'cav-G'};
    let html = '';
    s.closers.forEach(c => {
    const d = s.byCloser[c];
    if(d.ag+d.as+d.ci===0) return;
    const sr = pct(d.as,d.ag), cr = pct(d.ci,d.as);
    const b = badges[c]||{cls:'b-grey',txt:c};
    // Weekly rows
    const weekRows = {};
    s.md.filter(r=>r.Closer===c).forEach(r=>{
    const w=weekOf(r.Fecha);
    if(!weekRows[w]) weekRows[w]={ag:0,as:0,ci:0,cash:0};
    weekRows[w].ag+=r.Agendas; weekRows[w].as+=r.Asistencias; weekRows[w].ci+=r.Cierres;
    });
    s.co.filter(r=>r.Closer===c).forEach(r=>{
    const w=weekOf(r.Fecha);
    if(!weekRows[w]) weekRows[w]={ag:0,as:0,ci:0,cash:0};
    weekRows[w].cash+=r.Monto;
    });
    const wkeys = Object.keys(weekRows).sort();
    const whtml = wkeys.map(w=>`
    <tr>
    <td>${fmtDate(w)}</td>
    <td>${weekRows[w].ag}</td><td>${weekRows[w].as}</td><td>${weekRows[w].ci}</td>
    <td class="cash">${weekRows[w].cash>0?fmtMoney(weekRows[w].cash):'—'}</td>
    </tr>`).join('');
    const totCash = s.co.filter(r=>r.Closer===c).reduce((s,r)=>s+r.Monto,0);
    const totVenta = s.v.filter(r=>r.Closer===c).reduce((s,r)=>s+r.Venta,0);
    const sebAlert = c==='Sebastian' ? `
    <div class="alert warn" style="margin:0 14px 12px">
    <div class="alert-title">⚠ Alerta Conversión</div>
    Show rate ${sr}% pero 0 cierres. El cuello de botella está en la conversión, no en la convocatoria.
    </div>` : '';
    const guillAlert = c==='Guillermo' && d.ag<6 ? `
    <div class="alert gy" style="margin:0 14px 12px">
    <div class="alert-title">📌 Nota</div>
    Actividad muy baja (${d.ag} agendas). Necesita más volumen para evaluar su tasa de conversión real.
    </div>` : '';
    html += `
    <div class="ccard" id="cc-${c}">
    <div class="ccard-head" onclick="toggleCloser('${c}')">
    <div class="cav ${cavs[c]}">${c[0]}</div>
    <div class="cname">${c}</div>
    <span class="cbadge ${b.cls}">${b.txt}</span>
    <span class="chevron">▼</span>
    </div>
    View remainder of file in raw view

    Footer
